task_text: Draft a status update email to Meridian Group summarizing where Project Helios stands this week. Tone should be professional and reassuring. Save the draft as meridian_status_email_draft.txt.

input.content:
Subject: Project Helios Weekly Status Update

Dear Meridian Group Team,

I’m writing to provide a brief update on Project Helios for this week.

Overall, the project remains on track, with steady progress across the key workstreams. The team has continued to advance the current milestones, address open items, and coordinate closely to ensure dependencies are being managed effectively. No critical issues have emerged this week, and any minor risks or action items are being actively monitored and addressed.

Key updates from this week include:
- Continued progress against the current project plan and near-term deliverables.
- Ongoing coordination across internal teams to keep timelines aligned.
- Active tracking of open questions, dependencies, and next steps to support upcoming milestones.
- No major blockers identified at this time.

Looking ahead, the focus will remain on maintaining momentum, closing out outstanding items, and preparing for the next phase of planned activities. We will continue to keep you informed of progress and will promptly flag any developments that require attention.

Please let us know if there are any specific areas you would like covered in more detail in the next update.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
